user.title: Set up Herold
user.description: Herold routes messages to roles (Pub/Sub + RBAC). Setup is empty — use the Configure button after installation to manage topics, roles and recipients.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Herold is already set up — only one instance is allowed.

init.title: Manage Herold
init.description: What would you like to manage?

topics.title: Topics — selection
topics.description: {anzahl} topics registered. Pick one to edit or add a new one.

topic_edit.title: Topic {modus} — {topic_id}
topic_edit.description: With log_only, messages go only to history and events (no push, no last-resort notification).

rollen.title: Roles — selection
rollen.description: {anzahl} roles defined. Pick one to edit or add a new one.

rolle_edit.title: Role {modus} — {rolle_id}
rolle_edit.description: Members are recipient IDs. Deleting the role cleans it out of topics, admin overrides and the fallback role.

empfaenger.title: Recipients — selection
empfaenger.description: {anzahl} recipients registered. Pick one to edit or add a new one.

empfaenger_edit.title: Recipient {modus} — {empfaenger_id}
empfaenger_edit.description: Target = notify service (e.g. notify.mobile_app_iphone_17_ul). Deleting removes the recipient from all roles.

mapping.title: Topic-to-role mapping
mapping.description: Admin override per topic. Override takes precedence over producer defaults.

mapping_edit.title: Mapping for {topic_id}
mapping_edit.description: Producer default for this topic: {producer_default}. Empty role list or reset removes the override — producer defaults apply again.

einstellungen.title: Global settings
einstellungen.description: Fallback role kicks in when a topic has no roles. Retention controls the daily history cleanup (03:00).

error.invalid_topic_id: Invalid topic id — only lowercase, digits, underscore and slash allowed
error.topic_exists: Topic already exists — pick another id or edit the existing one

abort.phase2_pending: This management UI is coming in a later phase — until then, please use the services under Developer Tools.
abort.topic_not_found: Topic was removed in the meantime.
abort.rolle_not_found: Role was removed in the meantime.
abort.empfaenger_not_found: Recipient was removed in the meantime.
